scopes.description: Full CRUD access to all Items

scopes.description: Required for OAuth2 user-token exchange through the Destination service

role-templates.description: Allows this app to request Figaf user-token exchange scopes

role-collections.description: Viewer role collection for My BTP App

role-collections.name: MyBTPApp_Admin
role-collections.description: Admin role collection for My BTP App

role-collections.name: MyBTPApp_FigafConnector
role-collections.description: Figaf user-token exchange role collection for My BTP App
